    Subclasses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ThreadedIoDevice
    Implements a device that should be simulated on a thread alongside the main simulation loop.

  • Uses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device.block

    Subclasses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device.block
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BlockDevice
    Implements a block/disk device, based on Parallel ATA, with 28 bit LBA addressing of 512 byte sectors.

    Class

    KeyboardDevice
    Implements an IBM PC AT compliant keyboard device.

  • Uses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device.network

    Subclasses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device.network
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NetworkDevice
    Implements a network device that offers communication, through a hub, of words (32 bit) to all other devices.

  • Uses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device.timer

    Subclasses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device.timer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TimerDevice
    Implements a programmable interval timer (PIT) with 3 channels.

  • Uses of IoDevice in microsim.simulation.component.device.video

    Class
    Description
    class 
    VideoDevice
    Implements a video device that renders a frame buffer by reading from VRAM.
